name: IKD Co., Ltd.
summary: Ikd Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells auto high-precision aluminum die casting products for automobile industry in the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company offers wiper, filter, air condition, damper, steering, mirror, braking, engine lubrication, auto engine intake air control, auto transmission, engine electronic control, heuristic motor, and engine cooling systems, as well as oil pumps and cylinder blocks for auto parts suppliers. Ikd Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Ningbo, the People's Republic of China.
